description_long: This is a casual five-panel cap featuring a light blue fabric crown and a contrasting brown suede-like brim. The crown is constructed from soft, flexible material with visible stitching and two metal eyelets on each side for ventilation. A rectangular brown patch is sewn onto the front panel, likely for branding or decorative purposes. The brim is flat and wide, providing ample shade and a structured look. The back of the cap has an opening, possibly for an adjustable strap, though the strap itself is not clearly visible. The overall design is modern and urban, suitable for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A light blue five-panel cap with a brown flat brim and a rectangular patch on the front, featuring metal side eyelets and a soft, flexible crown.
description_view_0: Side view showing the light blue crown, brown flat brim, and two metal eyelets on the left side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rectangular brown patch on the front panel and the full width of the brown brim.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the back opening and two metal eyelets on the right side.
description_view_3: Back view showing the open section at the rear of the cap and the continuous blue fabric of the crown.
